text:
From: ashish@FreeBSD.org (Ashish SHUKLA)
Subject: Re: ports/162191: [PATCH] editor/emacs: VC doesn't work with subversion 1.7
Date: Sun, 13 Nov 2011 02:05:55 +0530

> Did you also submit this diff upstream ? Or if you've bug report, or mailing
> list post.

I got latest version of vc-svn.el from trunk of upstream repository,
and used it to create patch in PR. So it is not necessary to submit it
to upstream.

Regards.
